current_status_next_steps:
INC10488154  RSOS Volume Locked due to snapshot. On investigation it is found that there is another computeaction on the vm which was processed but not updated as expected. Patch the computeaction to mark it successful. 
Hence as per the runbook patch the computation as follow:


export NS=3af7bf0d548ebfd57b282309eab276bc
export COMPUTEACTION=SNAPSHOTr026-6c6a1aa9-0bc6-4e1a-96e1-f7cbbe62fc8f 
kubectl proxy --port 8002 &
PROXYPID=$!

curl --header "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" \
--request PATCH \
--data '[{"op":"replace","path":"/status/actionStatus","value":"SUCCESSFUL"}]' \
http://localhost:8002/apis/compute.genesis.ibm.com/v1beta1/namespaces/$NS/computeactions/$COMPUTEACTION/status

kill $PROXYPID

 -- runbook link -- 
 https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/snapshot_stuck_pending.html#snapshot-stuck-accepted_zsnap
